Property.name: description
Property.value: Dark theme with base control styles for nim-duilib framework

ThemeColor.name: color_gray_dark
ThemeColor.comment_cn: 次要背景/禁用控件底色

ThemeColor.name: border_control_focused
ThemeColor.comment_cn: 通用控件聚焦高亮边框

ThemeColor.name: text_disabled
ThemeColor.comment_cn: 禁用文本/不可交互控件

ThemeColor.name: bg_tab_ctrl_item_close_hovered
ThemeColor.comment_cn: 标签关闭按钮悬浮背景

ThemeColor.name: bg_tab_ctrl_item_close_pressed
ThemeColor.comment_cn: 标签关闭按钮点击背景

ThemeColor.name: border_selected_tab_item_outline_color
ThemeColor.comment_en: Selected tab item outline border bg

ThemeColor.name: border_split_level1
ThemeColor.comment_cn: 一级分割线/主要区域分隔

ThemeColor.name: border_split_level2
ThemeColor.comment_cn: 二级分割线/次要区域分隔

ThemeColor.name: bg_scrollbar_hovered
ThemeColor.comment_cn: 滚动条轨道背景悬浮态

ThemeColor.name: bg_scrollbar_btn_arrow_disabled
ThemeColor.comment_cn: 滚动条按钮箭头禁用态

ThemeColor.name: bg_scrollbar_btn_arrow_hovered
ThemeColor.comment_cn: 滚动条按钮箭头悬浮态

ThemeColor.name: bg_scrollbar_btn_arrow_pressed
ThemeColor.comment_cn: 滚动条按钮箭头按下态
